rationale: The citing note says prior work focused on “determinants of viewing time,” and the cited paper is specifically a cross-domain study of Web site visit duration drivers, so it is at least topically relevant as background motivation. However, the available evidence is only a DOI match with no in-text citation context, and the cited study’s focus (web browsing duration) is not obviously a direct method/theory source for the citing paper’s ad-identification experiments.
